title: FabricationNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-fabrication-server-rs for fabrication planning, instruction validation, and learning result fan-out.

$dd:nats.summary: Fabrication planning and validation request/result subjects.

subjects.name: FabricationRequests
subjects.description: Fabrication planning requests. Default for FABRICATION_REQUEST_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.requests

subjects.name: FabricationResults
subjects.description: Fabrication planning and validation results. Default for FABRICATION_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.results

subjects.name: FabricationDesignConversionRequests
subjects.description: Design input conversion requests for CAD, mesh, slicer, CAM setup, and neutral export workers.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.design.conversion.requests

subjects.name: FabricationDesignConversionResults
subjects.description: Design input conversion results carrying neutral exports, translator evidence, blockers, and review metadata.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.design.conversion.results

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionGenerationRequests
subjects.description: Instruction generation requests for slicer, CAM, postprocess, setup-sheet, and machine-code workers.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.requests

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionGenerationResults
subjects.description: Instruction generation results carrying machine code, setup sheets, simulation evidence, blockers, and release metadata.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.results
